mapper.select:
SELECT p.*, c.name AS client_name FROM projects p LEFT JOIN clients c ON c.id = p.client_id
AND p.status = #{status}
AND (p.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR c.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY p.updated_at DESC

SELECT p.*, c.name AS client_name, pm_e.name AS pm_name, exec_e.name AS executive_name, sales_e.name AS sales_name, ou.name AS org_unit_name FROM projects p LEFT JOIN clients c ON c.id = p.client_id LEFT JOIN employees pm_e ON pm_e.emp_no = p.pm_emp_no LEFT JOIN employees exec_e ON exec_e.emp_no = p.executive_emp_no LEFT JOIN employees sales_e ON sales_e.emp_no = p.sales_emp_no LEFT JOIN org_units ou ON ou.id = p.org_unit_id WHERE p.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO projects (name, client_id, status, start_date, end_date, contract_amount, description, memo, project_code, approved_date, pm_emp_no, executive_emp_no, business_place, category_major, category_minor, division, department, org_unit_id, participation_type, supply_type, sales_emp_no, customer_agency, customer_ordering, contract_name, contract_date, contract_start, contract_end, as_start, as_end, our_share_rate, our_amount, our_amount_vat_ex, contract_amount_vat_ex, payment_condition, defect_period, penalty_rate) VALUES (#{name}, #{clientId}, #{status}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{contractAmount}, #{description}, #{memo}, #{projectCode}, #{approvedDate}, #{pmEmpNo}, #{executiveEmpNo}, #{businessPlace}, #{categoryMajor}, #{categoryMinor}, #{division}, #{department}, #{orgUnitId}, #{participationType}, #{supplyType}, #{salesEmpNo}, #{customerAgency}, #{customerOrdering}, #{contractName}, #{contractDate}, #{contractStart}, #{contractEnd}, #{asStart}, #{asEnd}, #{ourShareRate}, #{ourAmount}, #{ourAmountVatEx}, #{contractAmountVatEx}, #{paymentCondition}, #{defectPeriod}, #{penaltyRate})
mapper.update: UPDATE projects SET name = #{name}, client_id = #{clientId}, status = #{status}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, contract_amount = #{contractAmount}, description = #{description}, memo = #{memo}, project_code = #{projectCode}, approved_date = #{approvedDate}, pm_emp_no = #{pmEmpNo}, executive_emp_no = #{executiveEmpNo}, business_place = #{businessPlace}, category_major = #{categoryMajor}, category_minor = #{categoryMinor}, division = #{division}, department = #{department}, org_unit_id = #{orgUnitId}, participation_type = #{participationType}, supply_type = #{supplyType}, sales_emp_no = #{salesEmpNo}, customer_agency = #{customerAgency}, customer_ordering = #{customerOrdering}, contract_name = #{contractName}, contract_date = #{contractDate}, contract_start = #{contractStart}, contract_end = #{contractEnd}, as_start = #{asStart}, as_end = #{asEnd}, our_share_rate = #{ourShareRate}, our_amount = #{ourAmount}, our_amount_vat_ex = #{ourAmountVatEx}, contract_amount_vat_ex = #{contractAmountVatEx}, payment_condition = #{paymentCondition}, defect_period = #{defectPeriod}, penalty_rate = #{penaltyRate} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM contracts WHERE project_id = #{projectId} ORDER BY contract_date DESC, id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO contracts (project_id, title, contract_type, contract_date, amount, status, original_name, stored_name, file_size, content_type, memo) VALUES (#{projectId}, #{title}, #{contractType}, #{contractDate}, #{amount}, #{status}, #{originalName}, #{storedName}, #{fileSize}, #{contentType}, #{memo})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM contracts WHERE id = #{id} AND project_id = #{projectId}
